---
title: "Cycling & EEG Entropy"
subtitle: "Neural complexity during cycling and rest"
description: "An R analysis pipeline examining recurrence-matrix entropy in scalp EEG signals recorded during cycling and rest across four behavioural conditions in healthy adults."
date: "2024-04-01"
image: ../images/cycling_entropy.svg
categories: [Research Pipeline, EEG, R, Reproducible Research]
---

## About

This project investigates how physical activity modulates neural complexity, using recurrence quantification analysis (RQA) applied to scalp EEG signals recorded from healthy adults during cycling and rest.

EEG was recorded across four behavioural conditions, and recurrence-matrix entropy was computed as a measure of signal complexity. The analysis pipeline is fully implemented in R and designed for reproducibility.

## Methods

- Scalp EEG recording across four conditions (rest and cycling at varying intensities)
- Recurrence quantification analysis (RQA)
- Recurrence-matrix entropy as a complexity measure
- Fully reproducible R pipeline

## Links

- 💻 [GitHub](https://github.com/circadia-bio/cycling-entropy)
